gh_3ef6e457c5ac8fbfa42301f1.title: Suggestion: add Canada-specific Hanzilla Jobs internship resource
gh_3ef6e457c5ac8fbfa42301f1.description:
Hi Zapply team — thanks for maintaining this broad internships tracker.

I noticed the list is primarily U.S.-focused, but it does surface some Canada-relevant internship/co-op roles too (for example Magna roles in Ontario). Would you be open to adding a small Canada-specific companion resource for students who land here while searching from Canadian universities?

Suggested Markdown:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canadian student internships/co-ops](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/) — free daily-updated board for Canadian university students and recent grads, covering internships, co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles across tech, data/AI, finance, engineering, business, sciences, and more. See also the [about/verification page](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/).
```

Why it might fit:
- Canada-specific coverage for students who need Canadian locations / remote-Canada roles, not only U.S. listings.
- Direct links go to company career pages; no paywall.
- It is broader than SWE only, so it can complement your tech/software internship list without trying to replace it.

Disclosure: I’m building Hanzilla Jobs. Totally okay if this is not the right fit for this repo — sharing because it may help Canadian students using the tracker.
